motivo: código extraído mas apenas 5/6 seções presentes
resposta:
solution:
def minSwaps(self, s: str) -> int:
    n = len(s)
    opening_brackets = [i for i in range(n) if s[i] == '['][::-1]
    closing_brackets = [i for i in range(n) if s[i] == ']'][::-1]

    swaps = 0
    for i in range(n // 2):
        if opening_brackets[i] != closing_brackets[i]:
            swaps += 1
            s[opening_brackets[i], closing_brackets[i]] = s[closing_brackets[i], opening_brackets[i]]

    return swaps

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
